seo.title: SDF — Developer Portals / API Management

when_to_use: SQL development with lineage for warehouse transformations
Data documentation auto-generated from SQL definitions
Type-safe SQL with schema validation in CI pipeline
Column-level lineage for compliance and audit

review.verdict: Interesting dbt alternative with better lineage, but miscategorized here and fighting a very entrenched incumbent.
review.best_for: Data teams wanting SQL-first lineage beyond dbt
review.not_for: API gateway workflows or non-SQL data stacks

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
